description_long: This is a rectangular, dark wood filing cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring three horizontal drawer sections on its front face. The cabinet has integrated rectangular cut-out handles on both the front and back, allowing for easy gripping and movement. The sides and back are constructed from wide, flat wooden panels with a smooth, matte finish, and the interior is hollow, providing ample storage space. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a modern aesthetic suitable for urban environments. There are no visible label holders or locking mechanisms, emphasizing a simple and functional style. The cabinet is likely intended for use in offices, garages, or other organized urban spaces where storage and mobility are important.
description: A dark wood, rectangular filing cabinet with three drawers and cut-out handles, featuring a modern, minimalist design. The cabinet is sturdy, smooth, and suitable for organized urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing three horizontal drawer sections and a rectangular cut-out handle at the top center.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat wooden panel with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with a rectangular cut-out handle but no visible drawer separations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing a plain wooden panel.
